title: Should there be another pilot
wikitext:
[]: Should there be another pilot?             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Sat Feb 09, 2008 2:07 pm I think NERV could use a fourth Eva. I don't care if it's 3,4, or 17.5. i just think id help out with the plot, yaknow?

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sat Feb 09, 2008 3:13 pm I reckon to many characters is going to screw up the story.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Feb 09, 2008 6:28 pm I'm 100 % sure there already is one: Glasses Girl C'mon ppl, you really think there is any alternative? Only way Khara can handle it in EVA fashion: Brutal end. Like Toji but worse.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Feb 09, 2008 7:06 pm Glasses Girl's purpose has yet be confirmed, however but yes, I share the bet that she "takes Toji's place" too

[]:             Quote Post by BeserkerUnit-01 » Sun Feb 10, 2008 7:19 am mrpanda wrote: I reckon to many characters is going to screw up the story.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Feb 10, 2008 8:12 am There's difference between long TV-series and movies

[]: Re: Should there be another pilot?             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun Feb 10, 2008 8:27 am BeserkerUnit-01 wrote: I think NERV could use a fourth Eva. ... I just think it would help out with the plot, yaknow?

[]: Re: Should there be another pilot?             Quote Post by Matt_Colly » Mon Feb 11, 2008 10:13 pm Hunter21 wrote: As for the glasses girl, she shows up for less than a second in a preview clip people, stop being so sure about who or what she is. Some of you guys have her so hyped up the only thing you're going to be when she shows up is disappointed.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 12, 2008 8:30 am Omedeto ending is one of the best ever! I for one also can't believe in "she is another seed" or "she's human version of angel" either, but it's very likely she's pilot 1) She's underaged 2) She's a girl 3) She has glasses 4) Thus she is moe 5) Thus people want to see her in plugsuit 6) All other underage characters in the show share that role as pilot 7) What else she could be?

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Feb 12, 2008 10:25 am Xard wrote: 7) What else she could be?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Feb 12, 2008 10:44 am AchtungAffen wrote: Xard wrote: 7) What else she could be?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Feb 12, 2008 11:26 am Xard wrote: 7) What else she could be?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Feb 12, 2008 6:05 pm do what , BobBQ?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Feb 12, 2008 7:40 pm NO. I'm already over-pleasured with Asuka, Rei and Misato. Anymore will make my head explode.

[]:             Quote Post by Anti-Goth » Wed Feb 13, 2008 4:21 pm BobBQ wrote: A TRAP.
